records.m_Talk_ENG: Now you're eating bullets too? You really are greedy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now you're eating bullets too? You really are greedy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now you're eating bullets too? You really are greedy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. My next attack will be...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. My next attack will be...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. My next attack will be...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah! That was a shock. I didn't expect a huge piece of metal to fall from above...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah! That was a shock. I didn't expect a huge piece of metal to fall from above...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah! That was a shock. I didn't expect a huge piece of metal to fall from above...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. I didn't have time to explain the whole plan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. I didn't have time to explain the whole plan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. I didn't have time to explain the whole plan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since the officer knew how to operate the crane, this plan was set up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since the officer knew how to operate the crane, this plan was set up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since the officer knew how to operate the crane, this plan was set up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though I don't really have a license for it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though I don't really have a license for it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though I don't really have a license for it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Being crushed under a 10-ton container, the effect should be definite.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Being crushed under a 10-ton container, the effect should be definite.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Being crushed under a 10-ton container, the effect should be definite.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Corruption ray signal is gone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Corruption ray signal is gone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Corruption ray signal is gone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although I'm detecting CRF energy from the ground after the signal disappeared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although I'm detecting CRF energy from the ground after the signal disappeared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although I'm detecting CRF energy from the ground after the signal disappeared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: CRF? Could it be what she's eaten?
records.m_Talk_DEU: CRF? Could it be what she's eaten?
records.m_Talk_FRA: CRF? Could it be what she's eaten?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, step back. I'm going to dismantle the container now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, step back. I'm going to dismantle the container now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, step back. I'm going to dismantle the container now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What if she manages to escape again...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What if she manages to escape again...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What if she manages to escape again...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're in the way. I wasn't really aiming for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're in the way. I wasn't really aiming for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're in the way. I wasn't really aiming for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So this is what it feels like to become an adult.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So this is what it feels like to become an adult.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So this is what it feels like to become an adult.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This cold sensation... It's completely different from before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This cold sensation... It's completely different from before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This cold sensation... It's completely different from before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have to get out of here somehow...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have to get out of here somehow...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have to get out of here somehow...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can see exactly what you're trying to do now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can see exactly what you're trying to do now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can see exactly what you're trying to do now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm complete as an <color=#ffd34c>adult</color>, and you're not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm complete as an <color=#ffd34c>adult</color>, and you're not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm complete as an <color=#ffd34c>adult</color>, and you're not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you have that power, you can't fully use it... I'll use it all for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you have that power, you can't fully use it... I'll use it all for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you have that power, you can't fully use it... I'll use it all for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm... slower than an ordinary human?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm... slower than an ordinary human?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm... slower than an ordinary human?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where are you going? Sis is still over there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where are you going? Sis is still over there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where are you going? Sis is still over there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you kept up this power struggle, you would've been caught by her too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you kept up this power struggle, you would've been caught by her too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you kept up this power struggle, you would've been caught by her too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have no choice but to wait for the next opportunity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have no choice but to wait for the next opportunity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have no choice but to wait for the next opportunity.
